payload.answer: User intervention required to resolve ambiguity in the 'Sam note' due to low model confidence. Cloud escalation is disabled to prevent incorrect memory updates.

entity_resolution.reason: Ambiguity in 'Sam note' cannot be resolved programmatically without risk of misclassification. User clarification needed to preserve memory integrity.

memory_cards.statement: Cloud escalation disabled due to low model confidence in ambiguous Sam note.

details: Ambiguity in 'Sam note' detected. No automatic resolution applied to preserve memory durability.
Cloud escalation remains disabled until user confirmation.

repair_options: Request user to clarify the ambiguous 'Sam note' content.
Temporarily suppress 'Sam note' from active memory until resolved.
Log ambiguity for review in a dedicated 'pending_resolution' memory bucket.
